_comment: Maps textbook_key (the same string stamped on questions.metadata.source_reference.textbook_key) to a local PDF that should be uploaded to R2 under sources/<textbook_key>/source.pdf. Keys here become rows in public.sources. Add new entries when authoring a new tree.

metadata.notes: Test-prep workbook. Practice-Problems sections per chapter, plus 2 full practice exams.
EPUB source — no PDF storage key. Practice Exercises per chapter; 4 full practice tests.
Used for the SC Precalculus content bank. Sections 10.2 (Parabolas), 10.3 (Ellipses), 10.4 (Hyperbolas) imported May 2026.
